home.heroDescription: Be part of history. Experience the world's largest spiritual gathering at the sacred banks of the Godavari River in Nashik.
home.kumbhDescription: The Kumbh Mela is a transcendent celebration where millions of pilgrims, saints, and seekers converge to take a sacred dip in the holy Godavari River. It is the world's largest peaceful gathering—a spiritual experience that transcends boundaries and unites humanity.
home.every12YearsDesc: Held on the sacred banks of the Godavari River in Nashik, representing centuries of unbroken devotion, culture, and spiritual unity.
home.infiniteImpactDesc: Millions of visitors, countless traditions, and a transformative spiritual journey that shapes lives and preserves ancient wisdom.

features.title: Explore Kumbhathon
features.description: Discover the significance, services, and spiritual legacy of the world's largest gathering
features.card1Desc: Connect with centuries of tradition and spirituality on the sacred banks of the Godavari
features.card2Desc: Stay informed with the latest news, alerts, and announcements from the administration
features.card3Desc: Comprehensive safety, medical, and support services for all pilgrims and visitors
features.card4Desc: Join millions of devotees in a once-in-a-generation spiritual experience

aboutUs.title: Information & Guidelines
aboutUs.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Nashik Kumbh Mela 2027
aboutUs.aboutKumbhDesc: The Kumbh Mela is a transcendent celebration where millions of pilgrims, saints, and seekers converge to take a sacred dip in the holy Godavari River in Nashik. Held every 12 years, it is the world's largest peaceful gathering — a spiritual experience that transcends boundaries and unites humanity across generations.
aboutUs.crowdMgmtDesc: Directing visitors, preventing overcrowding at ghats and temples, and ensuring orderly queues during peak times.
aboutUs.infoGuideDesc: Assisting visitors with directions, schedules, and arranging assistance to ensure comfortable navigation throughout the event.
aboutUs.medicalDesc: First responder support and coordination with ambulances to ensure medical emergencies are handled efficiently.
aboutUs.sanitationDesc: Ensuring the holy grounds remain clean and public facilities are hygienic throughout the event.
aboutUs.tip1: Carry a valid ID at all times
aboutUs.tip2: Wear comfortable shoes and light clothing
aboutUs.tip4: Follow all safety and security guidelines
aboutUs.tip5: Contact authorities if you need assistance
